text:
There once was a little dragon girl named Floonia. She lived in a warm valley filled with hummingbirds. Despite her fiery red skin, she wasn’t much of a dragon; she enjoyed decorating her halls with hummingbird feathers. One day, while frolicking through the forest, she stumbled upon a strange, shiny rock.

That night, Floonia dreamed of flying far away.

She woke up with ambition fluttering in her feathers. She flew up and up higher until she got to the moon. There, she found a castle made entirely of silver. It was beautiful! She climbed through its tall windows and found a high sill.

With a mighty flap of her wings, she perched on a chandelier.

On her desk sat a golden feather quill. She wrote her biggest adventure yet on a page covered in stars.

She set off on a quest to visit all the stars! For every one she visited, she brought them a piece of earth.

Back in her castle, Floonia
